author: kraju
orig: nie wiem jakbym był czarny i ktoś mi by wstawił banana to byłbym zadowolony
en: I don't know, if I was black and someone gave me a banana, I would be happy
pt: Não sei, se eu fosse negro e alguém me desse uma banana, eu ficaria feliz
label: xenophobic

context.author: kraju
context.orig: spierdalaj ale masz banana na droge zwierzaku
context.en: Fuck off, you've got a banana in the way, animal
context.pt: Vai se foder, você tem uma banana no caminho, animal
context.label: xenophobic

context.author: pentagram
context.orig: Jak banany mogą być rasistowskie, to jest  evenement
context.en: How bananas can be racist, that's evenement
context.pt: Como as bananas podem ser racistas, isso é tudo
context.label: clean

context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: Bez kitu chyba nie włączą marketu albo zrobią wszystko co mamy untradeable
